Details: Remote code execution via deserialization of untrusted data. An attacker who controls input to the load() function can execute arbitrary Python code on the host system.
SQL injection in the query builder allows extraction of sensitive database records via crafted filter parameters passed to the search endpoint.
Authentication bypass in the session management module allows an attacker to access protected endpoints without valid credentials by manipulating the session token.
Cross-site scripting (XSS) in the template renderer allows injection of arbitrary JavaScript when rendering untrusted user-supplied content.
Denial of service via malformed input causes the parser to enter an infinite loop, consuming 100% CPU until the process is manually terminated.
Dependency flagged by the scanner but severity data is not yet available in the OSV database. Monitor the OSV entry for updates.
